# One Link security contact (RFC 9116)
# https://www.rfc-editor.org/rfc/rfc9116

Contact: mailto:weareone@oneunity.earth
Expires: 2027-05-17T00:00:00.000Z
Preferred-Languages: en
Canonical: https://weareone-link.org/.well-known/security.txt
Policy: https://weareone-link.org/security/
Acknowledgments: https://weareone-link.org/security/

# Reporting
# Please report vulnerabilities to weareone@oneunity.earth.
# Encrypt sensitive reports with the One Link pair-by-QR flow
# at https://weareone-link.org/share/ if you have One Link installed.
# Responsible disclosure: we will respond within 5 days and
# coordinate a fix and public attestation if you wish.

# Source
# https://github.com/IamOneYouAreOneWeAreOne/one-link
# https://github.com/IamOneYouAreOneWeAreOne/one-link-website
